authProof.nextAction: Run /auth/status from a signed-in browser session and provide sanitized JSON evidence.

rows.label: BFF-014/013/012 dependency chain
rows.readinessSignal: Contract, selected-field proof, and service-authz markers are present.
rows.passCriteria: BFF-014, BFF-013, and BFF-012 remain no-live-read and no-public-output.
rows.blockedPattern: Live Research read before dependency markers are ready

rows.label: Owner-run allow and confirmation
rows.readinessSignal: Explicit allow flag or owner confirmation phrase is missing.
rows.blockedPattern: Implicit live read from default environment state

rows.label: Proof target classification
rows.readinessSignal: Proof target is missing, ambiguous, remote, or not marked disposable/local/owner-approved.
rows.passCriteria: Target is a declared safe category or a local disposable database URL with proof markers.
rows.blockedPattern: Ambiguous or valuable Research data target

rows.label: Auth proof availability
rows.readinessSignal: Latest sanitized auth proof does not yet allow AUTH-005.
rows.passCriteria: Supabase public env, signed-in /auth/status, and Profile mapping proof are all present.
rows.blockedPattern: Owner-scoped Research read without authenticated owner/Profile proof

rows.label: Dry-run boundary
rows.passCriteria: This CLI emits readiness only and performs no Research DB read or write.
rows.blockedPattern: Proof runner connecting to DB or returning private Research data

missing: PERSONAL_OS_RESEARCH_READ_PROOF_TARGET is missing or not classified as a safe proof target.
AUTH-005 sanitized owner/Profile evidence is not ready.
stopConditions: Stop before importing Prisma client, db clients, provider clients, cookies, headers, fetch, or Next route helpers.
Stop before connecting to a database, executing a live Research read/write, applying schema/migration/seed changes, or adding route handlers/server actions.
Stop before public output, external collaboration, external agent database access, Research agent final writes, external registration, or launch-level claims.
Stop if owner identity, proof target classification, selected fields, mapper output, or no-secret evidence becomes ambiguous.
nextSafeAction: Keep collecting owner-run prerequisites; this packet is safe for owner inspection and does not prove formal launch readiness.
